pages.text:
BUYING GUIDE
KUNGSFORS
Series


Smart storage gives flow in the kitchen
The KUNGSFORS series offers open storage that gives utensils, spices and recipes their
given and visible place on the wall. Organized utensils means more space and a better
flow in the kitchen, so that cooking is easier. The series is inspired by restaurant kitchens
and adapted for both small and large home kitchens. The different parts are also
designed to be combined in a variety of ways to meet different needs.


com. For more detailed product information, see the price tag or visit

GOOD TO KNOW


GOOD TO KNOW                                       CARE
You can build KUNGSFORS as a system with the parts and           The parts in KUNGSFORS are made of stainless steel, as well
features together in a combination, or mount them separately        a shelf in bamboo or ash veneer. You can wipe all parts with a
to the wall, just remember to use the included fittings. If               cloth moistened with a mild cleaning agent and then dry with
you build KUNGSFORS as a system, screw in and attach the          a dry cloth. Remember to always wipe stainless steel surfaces
suspension rail to the wall and then simply click in the parts             in the longitudinal direction of the surface. Also avoid using
you want, such as a shelf, rail or magnetic knife rack. You can          scouring powder, steel wool and hard or sharp objects since it
then adjust the position of the parts on the suspension rails          can scratch the stainless steel surface.
whenever you want, without making more holes in the wall.
                                                       SAFETY
                                                                        Different wall materials require different types of hardware. Use
                                                            hardware (sold separately) suitable for the walls in your home.


HOW TO BUILD

You can use the different parts of KUNGSFORS freestanding or
combine them as a system, which you mount with the help of
the suspension rails. Below you see the different ways that you
can use KUNGSFORS.

KUNGSFORS without suspension rails

       +           =


If you want a flexible solution, you can mount items of
KUNGSFORS directly on the wall freestanding and furnish your
wall just the way you want.


KUNGSFORS with suspension rails

   +        +           =


To build KUNGGSFORS as a system, you need at least two               solution. You click the parts in place on the suspension rails and
suspension rails that you mount into the wall. You then choose        can then adjust the height and replace or add parts whenever
the parts you want in order to create your personal storage          you want, without having to make new holes in the wall.

COMBINATIONS
Overall size: Width x Depth x Height.
The combinations we present here are suggestions for how you can build KUNGSFORS as a system based on different needs.
To create your own solution, see last page for all parts.

                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelf/magnet knife rack
                                                                      This combination includes three shelves in ash veneer to help
                                                          you store what you need, while providing a mixture of materials
                                                                      that feel warm and cool in the kitchen. The magnetic knife rack
                                                       makes it easy to see and reach your knives when cooking.
                                                                      Overall size: W251⁄4×D125⁄8×H311⁄2".
                                                                 392.543.26

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Ash veneer                      903.712.23   3 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Magnet knife rack, Stainless steel             403.349.21    1 pc


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelf/wall grid
                                                     A stainless steel combination of two shelves that allow you
                                                                      to see what is on the shelf from below. The wall grid creates
                                                      more storage space by hanging utensils with the S-hooks or
                                                                   containers in the series.
                                                                      Overall size: W251⁄4×D125⁄8×H311⁄2".
                                                                   192.543.32

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                   503.349.25   2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Wall grid, Stainless steel                     803.349.19    1 pc


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelf/rail/dish drainer
                                                     A small combination that makes life around the sink easier.
                                                         Use the top shelf for storage and the rail to hang the dish
                                                             brush or other things you need close by. The dish drainer has a
                                                            removable tray underneath that collects excess water from the
                                                                     drainer to protect your countertop. When you don't need the
                                                                     drainer function, the pins fold down for use as a regular shelf.
                                                                      Overall size: W251⁄4×D125⁄8×H311⁄2".
                                                                092.543.23

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Ash veneer                      903.712.23    1 pc
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Dish drainer                                 403.712.25    1 pc
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Rail, L22". Stainless steel                     403.349.16    1 pc


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelf/magnetic knife
                                                                rack/wall grid/ash veneer shelf A practical combination that
                                                       makes cooking easier. You can store pots and pans on the shelf
                                                                              in stainless steel, hang kitchen utensils close at hand on the wall
                                                                       grid and store your knives on the magnetic knife rack. Items not
                                                                  often used can be placed on the top shelf in ash veneer.
                                                                      Overall size: W487⁄8×D125⁄8×H311⁄2".
                                                                392.848.80

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   3 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Ash veneer                      903.712.23    2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Magnetic knife rack. Stainless steel           403.349.21    1 pc
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                   503.349.25   2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Wall grid, Stainless steel                     803.349.19    1 pc

COMBINATIONS
Overall size: Width x Depth x Height.
The combinations we present here are suggestions for how you can build KUNGSFORS as a system based on different needs.
To create your own solution, see last page for all parts.


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelves and rail You can
                                                                            easily adapt this compact combination to your space and create
                                                            a good flow in the kitchen. Store cookware, ovenware and dry
                                                         goods on the shelves and hang kitchen utensils, containers,
                                                                     fresh spices and anything else you want close by on the rail. Of
                                                               course you can also use it in other places in the home, like in
                                                                 the hallway or garage. If you choose the stainless steel version,
                                                          you can use it in the bathroom too.
                                                                      Overall size: W251⁄4×D125⁄8×H311⁄2".
                                                                 993.082.65

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf*, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                  503.349.25   3 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Rail, L22". Stainless steel                     403.349.16    1 pc


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelves This open storage
                                                                     gives you a good overview in your kitchen. Here you can store
                                                              cookware, ovenware, dry goods and other things that you want
                                                                      to easily see and reach. It's easy to adapt to your space and you
                                                            can also use the combination in other places in the home, like
                                                                             in the hallway or in the garage. If you choose the stainless steel
                                                                        version, you can use it in the bathroom too.
                                                                      Overall size: W251⁄4×D125⁄8×H311⁄2".
                                                                 593.083.33

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                   503.349.25   3 pcs


                                                 KUNGSFORS Wall grid with storage A practical combination
                                                                      that makes cooking and washing up easier. Store pots and
                                                           pans on the shelf in stainless steel, hang kitchen utensils and
                                                                anything else you want close by on the wall grid. The dish
                                                                    drainer has a removable tray underneath that collects excess
                                                               water from the drainer and protects your countertop. When
                                                          you don't need the drainer function, simply fold down the pins
                                                        and use it as a regular shelf. Items not often used can be placed
                                                       on the top shelf in ash veneer.
                                                                      Overall size: W487⁄8×D125⁄8×H401⁄8".
                                                                 492.543.35

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   3 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Ash veneer                      903.712.23    2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Dish drainer                                 403.712.25    1 pc
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                   503.349.25   2 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Wall grid, Stainless steel                     803.349.19    1 pc


* The KUNGSFORS shelves comes in stainless steel, ash veneer or bamboo -- each combination can be made with any of
the shelves if wanted, or a mix.

COMBINATIONS
Overall size: Width x Depth x Height.
The combinations we present here are suggestions for how you can build KUNGSFORS as a system based on different needs.
To create your own solution, see last page for all parts.


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelf/wall grid This full
                                                                        wall solution in ash veneer and stainless steel is created to give
                                                          you plenty of storage space, so you can store your cookware
                                                        and tableware in the same place, while providing a mixture of
                                                                    materials that feel both warm and cool.
                                                                      Overall size: W721⁄2×D125⁄8×H63".
                                                                   292.543.41

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   8 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                   503.349.25   9 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Wall grid, Stainless steel                     803.349.19   3 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Ash veneer                      903.712.23   6 pcs


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelf/rail/wall grid/
                                                         ash veneer shelf Mount this combination on the wall above
                                                                 the countertop and store everything you want close at hand
                                                    when cooking. You can put plates and glasses on the shelf in
                                                             ash veneer, and pots and pans on the shelf in stainless steel.
                                                         Use the rails for your kitchen utensils. KUNGSFORS containers,
                                                                    sold separately, fits perfectly on the wall grid -- ideal for things
                                                                                    like fresh herbs.
                                                                      Overall size: W721⁄2×D125⁄8×H311⁄2".
                                                                 592.848.79

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   4 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Ash veneer                      903.712.23   3 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                   503.349.25   5 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Wall grid. Stainless steel                     803.349.19    1 pc
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Rail, 22". Stainless steel                      403.349.16    2 pcs


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail/shelf/dish drainer/rail/wall
                                                                   grid A combination that holds everything you need in the
                                                                    kitchen for cooking and washing up. You can put plates and
                                                                    glasses on the shelf in ash veneer, and pots and pans on the
                                                                          shelf in stainless steel. The dish drainer has a tray underneath
                                                                      that collects any excess water and protects your countertop.
                                                 When you don't need the drainer function, simply fold down
                                                                 the pins and use it as a shelf.
                                                                      Overall size: W721⁄2×D125⁄8×H311⁄2".
                                                                892.543.38

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   4 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Ash veneer                      903.712.23   3 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                   503.349.25   4 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Wall grid. Stainless steel                     803.349.19    1 pc
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Dish drainer                                 403.712.25    1 pc
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Rail, L22". Stainless steel                     403.349.16    2 pcs

COMBINATIONS
Overall size: Width x Depth x Height.
The combinations we present here are suggestions for how you can build KUNGSFORS as a system based on different needs.
To create your own solution, see last page for all parts.


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelves and rail You can
                                                                                                        fit a lot of things in this generous combination, perfect when
                                                          you have a whole wall to use for storage. You can easily adapt it
                                                                      to your space and create a good workflow in the kitchen. Store
                                                              cookware, ovenware and dry goods on the shelves and hang
                                                               cooking utensils, containers, fresh spices and anything else you
                                                          want close at hand on the wall rack.
                                                                      Overall size: W721⁄2×D125⁄8×H63".
                                                                 493.083.62

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   6 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf*, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                  503.349.25   7 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf*, 235⁄8". Ash veneer                     903.712.23   3 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Wall grid. Stainless steel                     803.349.19    2 pcs


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelves This open storage
                                                                     gives you a good overview in your kitchen. Here you can store
                                                              cookware, ovenware, dry goods and other things that you want
                                                                      to easily see and reach. It's easy to adapt to your space and you
                                                            can also use the combination in other places in the home, like
                                                                             in the hallway or in the garage. If you choose the stainless steel
                                                                        version, you can use it in the bathroom too.
                                                                      Overall size: W251⁄4×D125⁄8×H63".
                                                                  093.083.97

                                                                Parts included in this combination

                                                                   KUNGSFORS Suspension rail, 311⁄2". Stainless steel          803.348.58   4 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Shelf, 235⁄8". Stainless steel                   503.349.25   5 pcs
                                                                   KUNGSFORS Wall grid. Stainless steel                     803.349.19    1 pc


* The KUNGSFORS shelves comes in stainless steel, ash veneer or bamboo -- each combination can be made with any of
the shelves if wanted, or a mix.

ALL THE PARTS
All parts can be used in the system between the suspension rails or used separately as freestanding parts.


                 KUNGSFORS Container Stainless steel.                                     KUNGSFORS Suspension rail Stainless steel.
                   Ø43⁄4, H103⁄8"                     003.349.18                                                                                       W15⁄8×D3⁄4×L311⁄2"                803.348.58


                 KUNGSFORS Container Stainless steel.

                  W91⁄2×D43⁄4×H103⁄8"               603.349.20                                                                                 KUNGSFORS Wall rack Stainless steel.

                                                                                          W22×H101⁄2"                     803.349.19


                 KUNGSFORS Hooks Stainless steel.

                 W1⁄4×D4×H31⁄4"                   703.796.92        3pk
                                                                                    KUNGSFORS Mesh bag The dimensions refer to when the
                                                                                               bag is laid flat on a flat surface. They are approximate and
                                                                                                       can vary -- depending on what you store in the bag.
                 KUNGSFORS Magnet knife rack Stainless steel.                                       141⁄2×113⁄8" and 167⁄8×151⁄2"

                 KUNGSFORS Magnetic clips Stainless steel.
                 W1⁄4×H31⁄4"                      003.349.23        3pk                         KUNGSFORS Cart The top part of the kitchen cart is loose
                                                                                               and can be used both as a tray and as a space to put things
                                                                                                                  on. Lockable casters for high stability. Can be used in high
                                                                                                             humidity areas. Stainless steel.

                 KUNGSFORS Rail Stainless steel.                                            W235⁄8×D153⁄4×H353⁄8"             803.349.24
                      L153⁄4"                          004.424.99
                      L22"                            403.349.16


                 KUNGSFORS Shelf W235⁄8×D113⁄4".                                             SYMFONISK WiFi bookshelf speaker Place the speaker
                    Ash veneer                      903.712.23                                                  horizontally or vertically, or mount it on the wall to use as a
                                                                                                                                 practical shelf. Also helps you to use your space optimally,
                  Bamboo                         004.017.81                                               while providing a rich sound that fills the entire room.

                   W235⁄8×D113⁄4"                   503.349.25

With

COMBINATIONS
Overall size: Width x Depth x Height.
The combinations we present here are suggestions for how you can build KUNGSFORS as a system based on different needs.
To create your own solution, see last page for all parts.


                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelf/wall grid This full
                                                                        wall solution in ash veneer and stainless steel is created to give
                                                          you plenty of storage space, so you can store your cookware
                                                        and tableware in the same place, while providing a mixture of
                                                                    materials that feel both warm and cool.
                                                                      Overall size: W721⁄2×D125⁄8×H63".

                                                         ash veneer shelf Mount this combination on the wall above
                                                                 the countertop and store everything you want close at hand
                                                    when cooking. You can put plates and glasses on the shelf in
                                                             ash veneer, and pots and pans on the shelf in stainless steel.
                                                         Use the rails for your kitchen utensils. KUNGSFORS containers,
                                                                    sold separately, fits perfectly on the wall grid -- ideal for things
                                                                                    like fresh herbs.

                                                                   grid A combination that holds everything you need in the
                                                                    kitchen for cooking and washing up. You can put plates and
                                                                    glasses on the shelf in ash veneer, and pots and pans on the
                                                                          shelf in stainless steel. The dish drainer has a tray underneath

sections.text:
GOOD TO KNOW                                       CARE
You can build KUNGSFORS as a system with the parts and           The parts in KUNGSFORS are made of stainless steel, as well
features together in a combination, or mount them separately        a shelf in bamboo or ash veneer. You can wipe all parts with a
to the wall, just remember to use the included fittings. If               cloth moistened with a mild cleaning agent and then dry with
you build KUNGSFORS as a system, screw in and attach the          a dry cloth. Remember to always wipe stainless steel surfaces
suspension rail to the wall and then simply click in the parts             in the longitudinal direction of the surface. Also avoid using
you want, such as a shelf, rail or magnetic knife rack. You can          scouring powder, steel wool and hard or sharp objects since it
then adjust the position of the parts on the suspension rails          can scratch the stainless steel surface.
whenever you want, without making more holes in the wall.
                                                       SAFETY
                                                                        Different wall materials require different types of hardware. Use
                                                            hardware (sold separately) suitable for the walls in your home.


HOW TO BUILD

You can use the different parts of KUNGSFORS freestanding or
combine them as a system, which you mount with the help of
the suspension rails. Below you see the different ways that you
can use KUNGSFORS.

KUNGSFORS without suspension rails

       +           =


If you want a flexible solution, you can mount items of
KUNGSFORS directly on the wall freestanding and furnish your
wall just the way you want.


KUNGSFORS with suspension rails

   +        +           =


To build KUNGGSFORS as a system, you need at least two               solution. You click the parts in place on the suspension rails and
suspension rails that you mount into the wall. You then choose        can then adjust the height and replace or add parts whenever
the parts you want in order to create your personal storage          you want, without having to make new holes in the wall.

Overall size: Width x Depth x Height.
The combinations we present here are suggestions for how you can build KUNGSFORS as a system based on different needs.
To create your own solution, see last page for all parts.

                                                 KUNGSFORS Suspension rail with shelf/magnet knife rack

                                                          you store what you need, while providing a mixture of materials
                                                                      that feel warm and cool in the kitchen. The magnetic knife rack
                                                       makes it easy to see and reach your knives when cooking.
                                                                      Overall size: W251⁄4×D125⁄8×H311⁄2".

                                                                       grid and store your knives on the magnetic knife rack. Items not
